plan: **Identify the order** — Provide name (Noah Patel), ZIP code (10108), and any order confirmation number to locate the relevant order in the system.
**Retrieve order details** — Ask the agent to pull up the full order so Noah can confirm which items are the home office items (the ones he forgot) and which are the hiking items.
**Check partial cancellation policy** — Ask the agent explicitly whether individual line items on a single order can be cancelled, rather than cancelling the whole order.

**If partial cancellation IS possible** — Request cancellation of only the home office items (once identified from the order details), confirm the hiking items remain active, ask for the refund amount for the cancelled items, and request the refund be returned to the original payment method.

**If partial cancellation is NOT possible** — Request a shipping address change for the entire order from the Seattle address to the NYC address (10108), so Noah can handle returns manually after receiving everything.
**Confirm refund amount (if applicable)** — Ask the agent to state the exact total dollar amount to be refunded for the cancelled office items.
**Confirm the chosen action** — Get a confirmation number or email confirmation for either the partial cancellation or the address change, whichever path was taken.
